response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r4c3 is distrusted, your SoC (11.5%) is below your own minimum threshold (15%), and honoring this request would accelerate your depletion timeline below the survival margin needed for emergency reconnection.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.15, distrusted_peers=['r3c4', 'r4c3', 'r4c5'].
Your latest belief: Islanded, SoC 11.5% declining at 1 kW (~70 min to depletion). All geographic neighbors have rejected transfers citing r4c4 as net-drain peer. Escalating emergency reconnection request to dr_aggregator. Suspending all outbound transfers to preserve autonomy margin and avoid accelerating collapse. Inbound requests from r3c3 and r4c3 cannot be honored without jeopardizing survival..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
